domainConstraint: All opportunities must ship under https://rrih.github.io/.

opportunities.title: Take-Home Pay Calculator
opportunities.primaryIntent: annual salary to net income calculator with tax and social insurance breakdown
opportunities.rationale: Income and tax tools can attract higher-value finance queries than generic developer utilities.

opportunities.title: Overtime Pay Calculator
opportunities.primaryIntent: calculate overtime pay from hourly wage, monthly salary, and premium rate
opportunities.rationale: Labor and salary queries have stable search demand and stronger commercial advertiser fit.

opportunities.title: Furusato Tax Limit Calculator
opportunities.primaryIntent: estimate furusato tax donation limit from income and family profile
opportunities.rationale: Tax-saving queries are monetizable, but the calculation needs careful testing and disclaimers.

opportunities.title: Mortgage Prepayment Calculator
opportunities.primaryIntent: compare mortgage balance, interest savings, and repayment-period reduction
opportunities.rationale: Mortgage queries can have strong RPM, but the tool needs accurate amortization logic.

opportunities.title: Retirement Allowance Tax Calculator
opportunities.primaryIntent: estimate retirement allowance deduction and taxable retirement income
opportunities.rationale: Retirement and tax planning searches are commercially relevant and evergreen.

opportunities.title: Child Allowance Calculator
opportunities.primaryIntent: estimate child allowance and family support payments
opportunities.rationale: Family benefit queries can build traffic diversity under the same utility-site brand.

opportunities.title: Childcare Leave Benefit Calculator
opportunities.primaryIntent: estimate childcare leave benefits from salary and leave period
opportunities.rationale: Benefit calculators can win long-tail searches when backed by clear formulas and caveats.

opportunities.title: Electricity Cost Calculator
opportunities.primaryIntent: calculate appliance electricity cost from watts, usage time, and kWh rate
opportunities.rationale: This is a lower-risk calculator that can be implemented deterministically and broaden traffic.
